features: 𝐓𝐀𝐊𝐄𝐀𝐖𝐀𝐘 𝐁𝐎𝐗𝐄𝐒: These fish and chips boxes are made from strong corrugated cardboard. It holds portions securely, it resists leaks and grease, and it provides reliable performance for takeout, delivery, and fast food service.

𝐒𝐈𝐍𝐆𝐋𝐄 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐓𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: This takeaway box features a single compartment and tuck-top closure. It is easy to fill, transport, and serve, and it helps maintain food presentation and freshness for customers on the go.

𝐄𝐋𝐄𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐓 𝐏𝐑𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐃 𝐅𝐈𝐍𝐈𝐒𝐇: These disposable boxes come with a printed design; it adds a professional touch, it enhances customer experience, and it makes food look appealing for restaurants, chippies, and catering services.

𝐇𝐈𝐆𝐇 𝐐𝐔𝐀𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘 𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐃𝐀𝐑𝐃𝐒: This takeaway box is manufactured to strict quality and hygiene standards; it is safe for direct food contact, and it ensures consistent reliability for commercial and home use.

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐈𝐍𝐆: These fish and chips boxes are available in small, medium, and large sizes; they accommodate different portion sizes, are suitable for a variety of dishes, and are ideal for takeout, fast food, and catering.
description: These Fish and Chips Takeaway Boxes from We Can Source It Ltd are made from durable corrugated cardboard, designed to provide a reliable and convenient solution for takeout and fast food service. These boxes are perfect for single portions of fish, chips, and other fast food items. The boxes feature a single compartment with a tuck-top closure, making them easy to fill, transport, and serve while keeping food secure. The printed design adds a professional and appealing look, enhancing the customer experience for restaurants, chippies, and catering services. Manufactured to high-quality and hygiene standards, these disposable boxes are safe for direct food contact and ideal for both commercial and home use. Their lightweight and sturdy construction ensures they hold food without leaking or losing shape. Available in small, medium, and large sizes, they provide a versatile option for different portion sizes and dishes. Perfect for takeout, delivery, fast food, and catering, these takeaway boxes offer a practical and stylish way to serve food while keeping it fresh and presentable. Features: small fish and chips takeaway boxes Durable corrugated cardboard for strong support Single compartment with convenient tuck-top design A printed finish adds a professional look for customers Meets strict hygiene and quality manufacturing standards Safe for direct food contact and everyday use Lightweight, sturdy, and resistant to leaks or grease Available in small, medium, and large portion sizes

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash only. Microwave safe. Not dishwasher safe. Avoid extreme temperatures after use. Do not use with sharp objects.
